properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's honey in the rock Water in the stone Manna on the ground No matter where I go I don't need to worry Now that I know Everything I need You've got There's honey in the rock

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praying for a miracle Thirsty for the living well Only You can satisfy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sweetness at the mercy seat Now I've tasted, it's not hard to see Only You can satisfy

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's honey in the rock There's honey in the rock There's honey in the rock There's honey in the rock (Yеah)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Freedom where the Spirit is Bounty in thе wilderness You will always satisfy, yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's honey in the rock, Water in the stone, Manna on the ground, No matter where I go, I don't need to worry, Now that I know, Everything I need You've got.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There's honey in the rock Purpose in Your plan Power in the blood Healing in Your hands Started flowing when You said it is done

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: There's honey in the rock Purpose in Your plan Power in the blood Healing in Your hands Started flowing when You said It is done Jesus, Jesus, who You are is enough

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: There's honey in the rock There's honey in the rock There's honey in the rock There's honey in the rock

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Oh, how sweet, How sweet it is To trust in You, Jesus Oh, how sweet, How sweet it is To trust in You, Jesus Oh, how sweet, How sweet it is To trust in You, Jesus To trust in You, Jesus We trust in You, Jesus Everything You did's enough
